name: Black and White Cake
recipeIngredient: WHITE SILK FROSTING and CHOCOLATE AMARETTO FILLING
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F and arrange rack in the center position. Grease and flour three, 8-inch round cake pans. Beat egg whites until stiff, but not dry and set aside briefly. In a separate bowl, beat butter with sugar until light and fluffy, then add vanilla and almond extracts. Blend smooth. Whisk flour with baking powder and salt; add alternately to the batter with milk, beginning and ending with the dry mixture. Fold in egg whites; divide batter evenly between pans. Bake 20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in center comes out clean. Cool layers in pans 10 minutes, then loosen and turn out onto racks to complete cooling.
YIELD: Three 8-inch layers
Beat cream cheese with butter until smooth. Blend vanilla and almond extracts. Gradually beat in confectioners sugar until smooth. Remove 1 cup frosting; blend with chocolate and Amaretto. Reserve remaining white frosting. Spread half of chocolate frosting over bottom layer, arrange second cake layer, repeat with remaining chocolate frosting. Use reserved white frosting to cover sides and top of cake. Decorate top with assorted white and dark chocolate leaves.
YIELD: One 8-inch cake
